title: Gin Turns on Sanji — Part 3
scene: On pages 8–11, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Gin is ordered to kill Sanji, but his debt and sympathy clash with Don Krieg’s brutal command.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: S-Sanji... I wonder if he's alright...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: He must've already had 5 or 6 of his ribs broken from that shield-wearing bastard earlier...!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: ...you're unexpectedly pretty weak, Mr. Battle Commander.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Guess the mighty krig pirates were all talk and no substance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now's my chance to send him flying!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: because I'll kill you as well within due time!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
